'''E'noro''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who represented [[Clak'dor VII/Legends|Clak'dor VII]] and the [[Mayagil sector/Legends|Mayagil sector]] circa [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]]. She sat on the [[Corruption Panel]]. She formally relieved [[Viqi Shesh]] of senatorial duties after being convicted of [[Treason/Legends|treason]].

{{Char-stub}}
